name: ReinforcementBase.ReinforcementVisibilityTypes
summary: The available reinforcement visibility types. Only applies to bar groups and meshes. See Tekla Structures help, "Setting the visibility of reinforcement in drawings", for more information.

enum_values.name: All
enum_values.summary: Shows all bars in a group or mesh.

enum_values.name: First
enum_values.summary: Only shows the first bar in the group or mesh.

enum_values.name: Last
enum_values.summary: Only shows the last bar in the group or mesh.

enum_values.name: FirstAndLast
enum_values.summary: Shows the first and last bar in the group or mesh.

enum_values.name: OneInTheMiddle
enum_values.summary: Shows one bar in the middle of the group or mesh.

enum_values.name: TwoInTheMiddle
enum_values.summary: Shows two bars in the middle of the group or mesh.

enum_values.name: Customized
enum_values.summary: Indicates that you have specified the location of the only visible reinforcing bar. See "Adjusting reinforcing bars" in the Tekla Structures help for more information.
